🚨 Uber is catching heat for discrimination after introducing a gender-based “women-only” ride feature for drivers and riders. Is it discrimination or discernment? Check out the full @breakfastclubam conversation on @netflix.

posts.text:
Rev. Pastor Jamal Bryant calls to end the Target 🎯 boycott after claims that the CEO has begun making effective changes and upholding 3 out of 4 demands. Local organizers in Minneapolis disagree and feel that the diversity and inclusion demands haven’t been met. Listen to Front Page News with @mimibrowntv.

Video
